description: NetBIOS Session Service — legacy SMB transport. Port 445 provides the full SMB toolset; these commands target NetBIOS-specific enumeration.

tools.name: enum4linux-ng
tools.description: NetBIOS and SMB enumeration over port 139.

commands.title: Full enumeration (anonymous)
commands.description: Run all enumeration modules via NetBIOS (null session).

commands.title: Full enumeration (authenticated)
commands.description: Run all enumeration modules with valid credentials.

tools.name: smbclient (NetBIOS)
tools.description: Connect to shares over NetBIOS transport.

commands.title: List shares (anonymous via NetBIOS)
commands.description: List shares forcing NetBIOS/SMBv1 transport on port 139.

commands.title: Connect to a share via NetBIOS
Null session enum (port 139)
commands.description: Enumerate shares via NetBIOS session service.
